title: Registry edge depth + run_verify --level 1 (direct-edge selection)
action: Per impacted-level1 D1. impact_registry.mjs: per file→suite edge record depth 'direct' (the suite source itself imports/pathToFileURL-imports/spawns/runModuleWorkers the file, or file IS the suite file) vs 'transitive' (reached only through a spawned/worker entrypoint's inherited closure). Registry JSON gains the split deterministically (e.g. file → {direct:[...], all:[...]} — pick the least-churn shape); --write/--check/--query updated (--query gains --level 1 too); regenerate and commit the registry. run_verify.mjs: --level 1 flag, valid only alongside --impacted/--impacted-from-git (typed refusal otherwise); selection uses direct edges only; banner 'IMPACTED RUN (level 1): N direct suite(s) from K changed file(s)'; when direct=0 but transitive>0, loud line naming the transitive count delegated to close/CI (still exit 0). Tests: extend test_impact_registry.mjs (a known transitive-only edge — e.g. state.mjs reached via bee.mjs spawn from a suite that never imports it directly — is absent at level 1 and present at full; determinism; --check covers the new shape) and test_run_verify_impacted.mjs (level-1 selection narrower than transitive for a hub file; refusal of bare --level 1; direct=0 loud note). Red-first evidence. Measure and report: suites selected for '--impacted .bee/bin/lib/state.mjs' at level 1 vs transitive.

truths: depth derived, never hand-tagged; deterministic registry
level-1 strictly narrower for hub files; transitive default unchanged (wave-close/merge untouched)
direct=0 => loud transitive-deferred note, never silent

verify: node scripts/test_impact_registry.mjs && node scripts/test_run_verify_impacted.mjs && node scripts/test_run_verify_only.mjs && node scripts/impact_registry.mjs --check

trace.outcome: registry v2 carries per-edge depth (direct ⊆ all); run_verify --level 1 selects direct only with typed refusal alone and loud transitive-deferred note; state.mjs: 9 direct vs 30 transitive; 41 checks green
trace.verify_command: node scripts/test_impact_registry.mjs && node scripts/test_run_verify_impacted.mjs && node scripts/test_run_verify_only.mjs && node scripts/impact_registry.mjs --check
